positive: A symmetrical and highly detailed composition of a celestial forest scene. The main subject is a fusion of stylized flora and geometric celestial bodies, featuring bioluminescent mushrooms, crystalline vines, and stylized crescent moons intertwined. The composition should emphasize clean, bold silhouettes with strong contrast. Utilize a palette of deep midnight blues, vivid ultramarine, cosmic violets, and pops of neon turquoise and lime green for the bioluminescence glow. The overall style should blend intricate linework (tattoo art style, ornamental vector design) with a modern, ethereal aesthetic. Central composition, perfect for apparel printing, UHD, hyper-detailed, clean edges, matte print finish.
